Jones and her big fat mouth / by Barbara Park; illustrated by Denise Brunkus. p. cm. “A First stepping stone book.” Summary: When her kindergarten class has Job Day, Junie B. goes through much confusion and excitement before deciding on the “bestest” job of all. eISBN: 978-0-307-75473-8 [1.
